heroDescription: Providing world-class healthcare with experienced doctors, advanced technology and compassionate care.
patientReviewDesc: Trusted healthcare with excellent patient satisfaction.
doctorSectionDesc: Highly experienced specialists dedicated to your health.

aboutHero.description: Welcome to City HealthCare, Sirsa's premier multispecialty healthcare destination where world-class medical innovation meets compassionate, patient-first care. Our elite team of specialists, advanced diagnostics, and integrated treatment approach ensure exceptional care for every patient under one roof.
aboutHero.feature1Desc: Rapid emergency response with multidisciplinary specialists.
aboutHero.feature2Desc: CT Scan, Digital X-Ray, Ultrasound, NCV, EEG, EMG and more.

welcome.para1: Welcome to City HealthCare, Sirsa’s premier multispecialty healthcare destination where world-class medical innovation meets compassionate, patient-first care.
welcome.para2: Built on a foundation of clinical excellence, we bridge the gap between complex tertiary specialties and everyday wellness by bringing advanced medical services under one roof. Our integrated approach combines highly experienced specialists with cutting-edge technology, ensuring every patient receives timely, accurate, and personalized treatment.
welcome.para3: From life-saving trauma care and advanced diagnostics to minimally invasive surgeries and rehabilitation, our focus is to deliver comprehensive healthcare that prioritizes safety, precision, and compassion at every step of the healing journey.
welcome.emergencyDesc: Emergency & Trauma Care with dedicated specialists always ready to serve.
welcome.card1Desc: Top specialists work together with our advanced diagnostics to provide faster decisions and seamless patient care.
welcome.card2Desc: Fully equipped CT Scan, Digital X-Ray, Ultrasound, Pathology and Neurophysiology labs under one roof.
